methods.description: Process for identifying and measuring diatoms attached to bryozoans using morphological approaches and software tools.

steps.description: Diatoms were identified by morphological approach (morpho-species).
All captured pictures from SEM results were selected by showing the clear diatoms attached to the bryozoan.
steps.searchable_summary: Select clear SEM images showing diatoms attached to bryozoans

steps.description: All attached diatom were measured at the apical and transapical axis (µm) by Fiji Software.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure diatom dimensions using Fiji Software

steps.description: In order to verify bryozoans as a habitat for diatoms and food sources, we classified the diatoms only at the genus level.
steps.searchable_summary: Classify diatoms at the genus level

steps.description: We were also able to reveal a diatom size (Table 1).
steps.searchable_summary: Compile diatom size data into a table
